description_long: This is a tall, stone obelisk with a Gothic architectural style, featuring a pointed spire at the top and intricate archways on each side. The structure is mounted on a square, tiered base that appears to be made of dark stone or marble, with visible weathering and discoloration. Each face of the obelisk has a recessed alcove framed by ornate columns and pointed arches, some of which contain steps or platforms within. The upper section is adorned with decorative finials and carved details, giving it a historic and monumental appearance. The overall color palette is a mix of gray, white, and dark stone hues, suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The obelisk stands as a prominent, immovable landmark, likely intended for commemorative or decorative purposes in an urban park or plaza.
description: A tall, Gothic-style stone obelisk with ornate arches and a pointed spire, set on a tiered square base. The structure features intricate carvings and weathered stone textures.
description_view_0: Front view shows a recessed alcove with steps, framed by ornate columns and a pointed arch, with the spire rising above.
description_view_1: This side reveals a plain alcove without steps, highlighting the detailed arch and the layered base.
description_view_2: Similar to view 1, this side displays a plain alcove and the square, tiered base, with visible stone texture.
description_view_3: Back view features another recessed alcove with steps, mirroring the front but with more pronounced weathering.
attribute_ornamentation: Gothic-style carvings and finials on the upper section, ornate pointed arches and columns framing each alcove.
attribute_base_design: The base is square and tiered, constructed from dark stone or marble, with visible seams and weathering. It features a broad, flat platform and a slightly raised plinth supporting the main shaft.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is a sharply pointed spire with decorative finials and carved details, characteristic of Gothic architecture.
